description: Mackenzie Mercury BN-RRM (GSL) with data-learned CPTs. BDeu (ESS=1.0) for stressor nodes, deterministic for effect/endpoint nodes. Learned from 604 fish cases and 855 water cases.

nodes.label: Total Hg Deposition (Nonpoint)
nodes.description: Sum: atmospheric + permafrost + soil erosion. Breaks: 0/10/15/20/50/>50 ug/m2/yr

nodes.label: Freshwater Fish Species
nodes.description: Five Indigenous food fish species in Mackenzie basin

nodes.label: Freshwater THg (ng/L)
nodes.description: Total mercury in water. Breaks: 0/10/26/>26 ng/L. CCME aquatic life = 26 ng/L

nodes.label: Fish Tissue Hg (ug/g ww)
nodes.description: Mercury in fish tissue. Breaks: 0/0.2/0.5/0.77/3/>3. Dillon 2010 dose-response

nodes.label: Degree of Injury (%)
nodes.description: Fish injury from Hg exposure. LL.3 model: 0-25/25-50/50-75/75-100%

nodes.label: Eligible Commercial Catch
nodes.description: Fish tissue Hg below 0.5 ug/g Canadian guideline for commercial sale

nodes.label: pTWI Exceedance
nodes.description: Provisional tolerable weekly intake exceeded. Thresholds: 0.7/1.4/3.3 ug/kgbw/wk

nodes.label: Proximity to Mine Development (15 km)
nodes.description: Within 15 km of active mine development. GSL point source.

nodes.label: Proximity to Historic Mine (15 km)
nodes.description: Within 15 km of a historic mine site. GSL-only per R code formulas.
